title: Ghatak / Lethal
subTitle: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Saath Naa Chhodenge
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: B4U Kadak
subTitle: Ram and Anjali, belonging to two rival families, fall in love. Later, after they come from abroad, they strive to reunite their loved ones.

title: Zubeidaa
subTitle: Brought up by his maternal grandmother, Riyaz is on a determined quest to find and understand his mother. His search ultimately takes him on the complex journey his mother went through.

title: Laila
subTitle: Deshraj and Leela's love thrives under the shadows of enmity between two Rajput families. This triggers a clash of expectations, egos, and bullets, placing several lives in danger.

title: Rustum
subTitle: Abhishek Bhargav, a police officer, decides to avenge the death of his friend, DCP Bharath. When his investigation lands him in Bengaluru, he discovers the roots of an organ trading mafia.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Papi Gudia
subTitle: A criminal uses a possessed doll to lure children and kill them. His latest target is Raju, the young brother of a dancer, who soon becomes the main suspect in a series of murders.

title: Loha
subTitle: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident is a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident is a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

title: Illaka
subTitle: Two brothers grow up and end up choosing career paths that are polar opposites, one becomes a smuggler and the other a police officer.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Sherdil Bharat
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Main Inteqam Loonga
subTitle: A man discovers the truth behind his father's tragic demise and vows to avenge him, oblivious to the consequences that await him.

title: Chori Mera Kaam
subTitle: Chori Mera Kaam

title: Shaktiman
subTitle: When Vicky and Amar get switched at birth, one grows up to be a police officer and the other a murderer. Things take a turn when their parents learn the truth.

title: Andhaa Kaanoon
subTitle: Two siblings, Vijay and Durga, vow to avenge the death of their parents. So, Durga becomes an inspector to punish the criminals, whereas Vijay breaks the law to achieve his goal.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Drishyam
subTitle: When his daughter accidentally kills a man in self-defence, Georgekutty uses his film knowledge to cover it up. Even when the investigation catches up with them, Georgekutty looks out for his family.
